meta.comparison_label: Strategy A (multi-factor L/S) vs Strategy B (tech+VIX)
meta.factors_A: momentum (12-1m) + low-vol (12m) + short-term reversal (1m). Value factor dropped from primary backtest due to data overlap issues — see notes.
meta.vix_overlay_B: Gross exposure: 100% if VIX<16, 75% if 16-24, 40% if 24-32, 0% if >=32. Lagged 1 month.
